work_experience.responsibilities: Prepared teaching materials and equipment; managed student attendance and records; maintained a clean, safe, and organized classroom; assisted lead teacher in supporting student engagement and reinforcing key concepts.

Assisted lead teacher in designing and organizing effective lesson plans; collaborated with instructors to identify learning challenges and propose interventions; provided additional instruction and clarification to students requiring extra support.

Independently led coding classes for students aged 7-18, covering Scratch, Python, and Lua; took full responsibility as main instructor for multiple classes, ensuring lesson delivery, student engagement, and classroom management; adapted teaching methods to different age groups and learning styles; monitored student progress, provided constructive feedback, and maintained communication with parents.
